prompt: Trap: single strong card is not enough alone here, choose fold.
why_v1: Fold protects chips when range strength does not justify continuing.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Folding fits when one strong card is not enough to keep the whole range profitable.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. A single strong card is not enough here, so this trap spot should release with a fold instead of forcing a continue.
